entries.title: GCP Service Account Scope Checker
entries.notes: Parses IAM JSON on any GCP console page and visually maps granted scopes against required APIs. Ships as a devtools panel with a free tier for 5 checks/day, per-seat for teams. Niche but painful enough that GCP shops will pay.
entries.pain: Engineers misconfigure GCP service account scopes and waste hours on permission errors in production.

entries.title: Salesforce Field-Level Audit Overlay
entries.notes: Injects a sidebar on Salesforce record pages showing change history for the focused field. Uses Salesforce REST API with user OAuth. Freemium unlocks 30-day history; per-seat for full audit trail. Targeting mid-market ops teams.
entries.pain: Sales ops teams lose visibility into who changed critical CRM fields and when, causing data integrity issues.

entries.title: Public Bug Bounty Scope Visualizer
entries.notes: Scrapes HackerOne/Bugcrowd program pages and renders a visual scope map with asset types, subdomains, and expiry flags. Chrome extension context menu triggers parse. Bridges to a web dashboard for saved programs. Built in a weekend with Playwright.
entries.pain: Security researchers manually parse bug bounty program scopes instead of quickly knowing what's in-scope.

entries.title: Conference Session Conflict Detector
entries.notes: Parses conference schedule pages (Luma/Eventbrite) and flags time conflicts when you bookmark sessions. Local storage tracks your selections. Simple, single-purpose, no backend needed. Donate if it saves your conference.
entries.pain: Conference attendees miss sessions they wanted because tracking overlaps across multiple tracks is mental overhead.

entries.title: Stripe Test Mode Request Inspector
entries.notes: Filters the DevTools network panel to show only Stripe API requests, decorates responses with human-readable event types, and logs to a dedicated panel. Auto-detects sk_test_ keys. Pairs with a lightweight web replay feature for debugging.
entries.pain: Developers waste time filtering through Chrome network tab to find Stripe test mode API calls.

entries.title: AI Conversation Turn Counter
entries.notes: Intercepts API calls to ChatGPT/Claude/Cursor and tracks turn count per session against known plan limits. Displays a subtle badge. Quota-based unlocking for multi-account tracking. Clever wrapper that adds value without touching model outputs.
entries.pain: AI chatbot users lose track of how many turns they've used in tiered pricing plans and get surprised by limits.

entries.title: WebPage Accessibility Diff Checker
entries.notes: Captures axe-core results on current page, compares against a saved baseline, and flags new/resolved violations. Uploads diffs to a shared team dashboard. Per-seat SaaS for teams; free for solo devs. Targets accessibility-focused orgs.
entries.pain: Accessibility regressions slip through code reviews when there's no automated comparison between page versions.

entries.title: Cold Outreach Personalization Generator
entries.notes: Right-click any LinkedIn profile or company page and generates 3 personalized icebreakers using local LLM calls. No data leaves the browser. Tip jar model; works offline after initial load. Targets SDRs who value speed over depth.
entries.pain: Sales reps send generic outreach that gets ignored because personalizing each message is too time-consuming.

entries.title: Browser DOM Snapshot Diff Viewer
entries.notes: Captures full DOM snapshots at two points and renders a side-by-side tree diff with added/removed/modified nodes highlighted. Export to HTML report. Built on top of diff-match-patch. Freemium for 5 diffs/day; unlocks unlimited with account.
entries.pain: Frontend developers manually compare DOM states across page versions when debugging rendering bugs.

entries.title: Podcast Episode Topic Finder
entries.notes: Scrapes podcast RSS feeds and overlies chapter markers with AI-generated topic summaries. Supports Apple Podcasts/Spotify web players. Single-purpose tool with tip jar. Niche but engaged audience of knowledge workers.
entries.pain: Podcast listeners skip episodes because there's no way to preview topics without listening to the whole show.

entries.title: WebFont License Checker
entries.notes: Detects font-face declarations and cross-references against open-source license databases (Google Fonts, Font Squirrel). Flags commercial/OFL fonts in use with appropriate attribution reminders. Simple, runs locally, no backend required for core scan.
entries.pain: Developers use web fonts without checking licenses and risk legal issues for commercial projects.

entries.title: Gong Call Clip Extractor
entries.notes: Adds a panel to Gong web player that lets you set in/out points and generates a shareable short clip link. Uses Gong API with user token. Per-seat for reps who share clips externally. Solves a real daily friction point.
entries.pain: Sales managers spend too long scrubbing through Gong recordings to find the 30-second clip they want to share.

entries.title: LocalStorage Size Tracker
entries.notes: Shows a persistent badge with total localStorage usage across all origins. Drill-down shows per-domain breakdown with oldest keys flagged. Useful during development. Freemium model with alerts on quota thresholds.
entries.pain: Web developers hit localStorage quota limits without realizing which sites are consuming the most space.

entries.title: OpenAPI Endpoint Coverage Mapper
entries.notes: Parses OpenAPI spec from any URL or local file, cross-references with network traffic observed while browsing the app, and highlights untested endpoints in red. Generates a coverage report. Built for API-first teams.
entries.pain: Backend teams don't know which documented API endpoints are actually implemented and tested vs just specged.

entries.title: Browser Network Retry Analyzer
entries.notes: Instruments XMLHttpRequest and fetch to track retry counts per endpoint, showing success after N retries, ultimate failures, and latency impact. Aggregates into a retry heatmap panel. Freemium with per-session history; team dashboard behind per-seat paywall.
entries.pain: Debugging flaky network requests means manually counting retries in the Chrome network tab, which is error-prone.
